findings.citation: V-spec, 'Vector Memory Consistency Model' (vector accesses obey RVWMO per element; FENCE orders them against other accesses)
findings.detail: Vector element accesses each obey RVWMO as scalar accesses. No FENCE present; element accesses may reorder relative to the observer.

findings.citation: Svpbmt: NC main-memory accesses are weakly ordered; FENCE (rw,rw / iorw,iorw) supplies the ordering
findings.detail: No FENCE orders the NC access; weak outcome is permitted by the prose.

fusion.reason: 2 orderable fusion feature(s) lack the documented barrier; the reordered outcome is permitted by the extension prose and needs a stress window + coverage instrumentation to exhibit (never a herd forbidden claim).

reason: Extension-prose fusion analysis (informative, no herd verdict): 2 orderable fusion feature(s) lack the documented barrier; the reordered outcome is permitted by the extension prose and needs a stress window + coverage instrumentation to exhibit (never a herd forbidden claim).
